title: alnus rugosa var. obtusifolia
intro: Alnus rugosa var. obtusifolia, also known as the American green alder or smooth alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alnus rugosa var. obtusifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
